site.title: BF6 Tracker
site.subtitle: Battlefield 6 Player Stats & Community Anti-Cheat
site.description: Track player stats, view career summaries, and participate in community-driven anti-cheat marking.

hero.title: BF6 Stats Tracker
hero.subtitle: Track player stats, view detailed career summaries, and help keep the community clean.
hero.placeholder: Enter EA ID, Steam ID, PSN ID, or Xbox Gamertag...
hero.tip: Tip: For first time search, better use EA ID.
hero.platforms: Supports Origin, Steam, PSN, Xbox Live

topMarks.title: Player Marks Ranking
topMarks.subtitle: Most reported players by the community. Click a card to view detailed data.

stats.updatedAt: As of {{date}}, we have tracked the above data.

player.notFoundDesc: We couldn't find a player matching that identifier. Please check and try again.

stats.noMatches: No matches recorded yet. Play some games and check back!

player.marksEmpty: No community marks for this player yet.

marks.title: Community Marks
marks.description: Help maintain a healthy gaming environment by reporting suspicious behavior.
marks.alreadyMarked: You have already marked this player today.

status.title: Service Status
status.allHealthy: All monitored services are responding normally.

search.title: Search Results
search.placeholder: Enter EA ID, Steam ID, PSN ID, or Xbox Gamertag...
search.noResults: No players found matching your search.

cookies.banner: This site uses cookies for essential functionality and optional analytics.
cookies.essentialDesc: Required for site functionality: language, recent searches, authentication, and privacy preferences.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand site traffic and usage patterns.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we handle your data.

donate.title: Support OpenBF6Tracker
donate.description: Help us cover server costs and keep the tracker free for everyone. All donations go toward infrastructure and development.
donate.afdianNote: Please include your game ID in the note.
donate.howToClaimDesc: Copy your afdian order number, go to My Page and enter the order number and your player identifier to claim.

myPage.title: My Page
myPage.description: Manage your linked accounts, view sponsor status, and submit streamer verification.
myPage.bindIdDesc: Link your EA ID, Steam ID, or other platform accounts for one-click profile access.
myPage.placeholderId: Enter EA ID or Steam ID...
myPage.redeemDesc: After sponsoring, enter your afdian order number and game identifier to activate your name color.
myPage.redeemSubmitted: Your redemption request has been submitted. It will be processed within 24 hours.
myPage.streamerVerifyDesc: Verified streamers get a dedicated card on the homepage and sponsor color perks. Submit your application to get started.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: For bug reports, false mark appeals, partnerships, or general inquiries.
contact.sent: Message sent successfully. We'll get back to you soon.

footer.copyright: OpenBF6Tracker is a community project. Not affiliated with EA or DICE.
